creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rezny
Date: Mon Oct 16 19:45:16 UTC 2017
New revision: 452247
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/452247

Log:
  Drop POTREVISION form slaves so they go forward with xorg-server.
  Adding PORTREVISION to explicitly bump them after the recent CVE patches
  actually caused the revision to go backwards instead of forwards.

  PR:		223049
  Reported by:	mandree

Changes:
  head/x11-servers/xorg-nestserver/Makefile
  head/x11-servers/xorg-vfbserver/Makefile
  head/x11-servers/xwayland/Makefile
